title: Packet 071 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 071 dormancy decision through the parent-root boundary and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity so the current host-workflow-hardening lane is explicitly parked in repo-visible state.
